curation_problem: Artifact records collapse base releases, fine-tunes, adapters, merges, and deployment packages.
empirical_basis: Repository artifact typing and metadata audit.
recommended_metadata_or_interface: Require a typed artifact-role field with multi-label packaging overlays.

curation_problem: Family names are useful but often insufficient for exact genealogy.
empirical_basis: Lineage audit: strict support much lower than usable support.
recommended_metadata_or_interface: Represent upstream relation type explicitly: base, teacher, adapter target, merge input, quantization source, baseline only.

curation_problem: Paper records often report benefits without complete reusable artifact packages.
recommended_metadata_or_interface: Expose release package fields for code, weights/adapters, data/evaluation assets, scripts, and full recipes.

curation_problem: Papers and repositories are linked inconsistently.
empirical_basis: Paper-repository alignment signals from HF and GitHub links.
recommended_metadata_or_interface: Add bidirectional paper-to-repository and repository-to-paper relation fields with DOI/arXiv identifiers.

curation_problem: Weak and ambiguous provenance signals can be mistaken for exact lineage.
recommended_metadata_or_interface: Store provenance confidence/evidence tier rather than a single unqualified family label.
